activeAbilities.name: Necrotic Salve
activeAbilities.description: Target friendly character restores 1 Wd. If at least one friendly model was slain this turn, the target also gains +1 energy.

activeAbilities.name: Drain Life
activeAbilities.description: Target other friendly character is slain. If the target wasn't a Psychopomp then the next time this character uses Reanimate this turn, reduce its energy cost to (0) and gain +2 Arcane Stat for the duration of the action.

arcaneAbilities.name: Reanimate
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a friendly slain model in base contact with this model. Restore half its health rounding up. It has no energy but may activate this turn. 
Catastrophe: This model suffers 4 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Summon a Helping Hand
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place a new Familiar Psychopomp in base contact with this character. 
Catastrophe: This model suffers 3 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Raise the Banner!
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Reduce Dmg suffered by -1. Choose another friendly Soldier within 4" and move it 2".
